name: ping
description: Send ICMP echo requests to a host

options.name: -c
options.description: Stop after sending this many packets

options.name: -i
options.description: Wait this many seconds between packets

options.name: -s
options.description: Set the number of data bytes to send

options.name: -W
options.description: Time in milliseconds to wait for a reply

options.name: -q
options.description: Quiet output; show only summary lines

args.name: host
args.description: Host name or IP address to ping
